'''yahojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeaxanthin|zeaxanthin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeaxanthin|zeaxanthin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yahojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæhejeth|yæhejeth]] || [[word:yæhejej|yæhejej]] || [[word:yæhejesh|yæhejesh]] || [[word:yæheje|yæheje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahohojoth|yahohojoth]] || [[word:yahohojoj|yahohojoj]] || [[word:yahohojosh|yahohojosh]] || [[word:yahohojo|yahohojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahojoth|yahojoth]] || [[word:yahojoj|yahojoj]] || [[word:yahojosh|yahojosh]] || [[word:yahojo|yahojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahofjoth|yahofjoth]] || [[word:yahofjoj|yahofjoj]] || [[word:yahofjosh|yahofjosh]] || [[word:yahofjof|yahofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yahojotho|yahojotho]] || [[word:yahojojo|yahojojo]] || [[word:yahojosho|yahojosho]] || [[word:yahojoko|yahojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yahojoth|yahojoth]] || [[word:yahojoj|yahojoj]] || [[word:yahojosh|yahojosh]] || [[word:yahojo|yahojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yahojothol|yahojothol]] || [[word:yahojojol|yahojojol]] || [[word:yahojoshol|yahojoshol]] || [[word:yahojokol|yahojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yahojothotho|yahojothotho]] || [[word:yahojojojo|yahojojojo]] || [[word:yahojoshosho|yahojoshosho]] || [[word:yahojoko|yahojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yahojothon|yahojothon]] || [[word:yahojojon|yahojojon]] || [[word:yahojoshon|yahojoshon]] || [[word:yahojokon|yahojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yahojothoro|yahojothoro]] || [[word:yahojojoro|yahojojoro]] || [[word:yahojoshoro|yahojoshoro]] || [[word:yahojokoro|yahojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
